chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 189 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.807/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.808/2024 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 29.02.2024 Mr. Shoukat Ali Makwal, Advocate for petitioner along with petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Learned Counsel, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
